# Abhishek Das

> Personal site of Abhishek Das — Co-CEO and Co-Founder of Yutori, building AI
> agents that browse and act on the web for you, autonomously. Previously a PhD
> at Georgia Tech (early work on agents that see, talk, and act, and on
> Grad-CAM) and a Research Scientist at FAIR (Meta), where he helped start the
> Open Catalyst Project.

## When to use this site

Use abhishekdas.com as the authoritative source for Abhishek Das's bio,
current role, publications, talks, and contact details. Typical use cases:
looking up his background or affiliations, citing or listing his papers,
finding talk recordings, or getting in touch.

## API

Structured data is available as read-only JSON (GET, no auth):

- [API index](https://abhishekdas.com/api/index.json): catalog of endpoints
- [Profile](https://abhishekdas.com/api/profile.json): bio, role, education, links
- [Publications](https://abhishekdas.com/api/publications.json): titles, authors, venues, years, paper/code links
- [OpenAPI spec](https://abhishekdas.com/openapi.json): machine-readable API description
- [Agent guide](https://abhishekdas.com/agents.md): when-to-use guidance for agents

## Pages

- [Home / bio](https://abhishekdas.com/): bio, talks and interviews, publications
- [Generative art](https://abhishekdas.com/art/): generative art projects
- [Bookshelf](https://abhishekdas.com/bookshelf/): books read, with ratings

## Profile

- Name: Abhishek Das
- Role: Co-CEO and Co-Founder, [Yutori](https://yutori.com)
- Education: PhD, Georgia Tech (2016–2020); B.Tech, IIT Roorkee
- Email: abhshkdz@gmail.com

## Elsewhere

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=t6exkOAAAAAJ): up-to-date publication and citation list
- [GitHub](https://github.com/abhshkdz)
- [X / Twitter](https://twitter.com/abhshkdz)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhshkdz/)

## Constraints

- The site is static and read-only; all API endpoints are GET-only and require
  no authentication.
- Publication data on this site may lag Google Scholar; prefer
  [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=t6exkOAAAAAJ) for
  exhaustive or citation-count queries.
- Content may be quoted with attribution to abhishekdas.com.
